generator: Phase 4 AI adaptation read of FLOW-04 services, contracts, and visual evidence

freedomKeys.name: flow04_rsvp_cancellation_window_hours
freedomKeys.semantics: Number of hours before event start when attendee cancellation remains allowed.
freedomKeys.observableVia: Acme organiser attendance policy screenshot shows a 6-hour cancellation window.

freedomKeys.name: flow04_feedback_window_hours
freedomKeys.semantics: Number of hours after the event when attendee feedback remains open.
freedomKeys.observableVia: Acme feedback-window screenshot shows feedback open for 12 hours.

chosenAdaptationForThisSession.rationale: The RSVP cancellation and feedback-window values are tenant-facing policy knobs. Changing their values proves tenant adaptation without changing service structure or breaking the FLOW-03 co-install boundary.

crossFlowBoundary.readsFromFLOW03: event source records and event lifecycle boundary
crossFlowBoundary.cascadeImpact: Tenant forks of FLOW-04 must preserve the required co-install with Event Management.
